section_9.title: Processing of personal data of children
section_9.content: Section 9(1): Must obtain verifiable parental consent before processing child's data. Section 9(2): Prohibited activities include tracking, behavioral monitoring, targeted advertising, and processing detrimental to child's well-being.
key_requirements: No processing detrimental to child's well-being

rule_10.title: Verifiable consent of parent or guardian of child
rule_10.content: Specific requirements for obtaining and verifying parental consent for processing children's data.
